import pandas as pd


def save_dataframe_to_db(df: pd.DataFrame, table_name: str, engine):
    for _, row in df.iterrows():
        engine.execute(
            f"INSERT INTO {table_name} (name, value, timestamp) VALUES (?, ?, ?)",
            row["name"],
            row["value"],
            row["timestamp"],
        )


def export_users_to_database(users_df: pd.DataFrame, conn):
    for idx, row in users_df.iterrows():
        conn.execute(
            "INSERT INTO users (username, email, age) VALUES (?, ?, ?)",
            row["username"],
            row["email"],
            row["age"],
        )
    conn.commit()
